series_metadata.series_title: Time Study Analysis on Staff Hearing Officer''s Appeal Issues; Quarterly
series_metadata.series_description: This report provides statistical analysis of the time frames as established by HB 107 for staff appeal issues. It presents the Median Day interval required to process a claim for hearing at various points during adjudication. The report includes several analyses: Median Day for all risk types, a claim receipt, and claims heard analysis.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years from publish date of report. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years from publish date of report., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
